action_text: Press Enter in the list search field to run the search
rationale: The report title is already typed into the list search field; pressing Enter should execute the list search and filter the reports to find “Incidents by agent.”

action_text: Click the magnifying-glass button next to the list search field
rationale: Clicking the search icon next to the list search box should also execute the search for “Incidents by agent.”

action_text: Toggle the list filter (Show/Hide filter) to enable building a Title filter
rationale: If the search doesn’t run, enabling the list filter builder allows filtering by Title contains “Incidents by agent,” which directly locates the report.

action_text: Sort the reports list by the Title column
rationale: Sorting by Title can make it easier to visually locate an “Incidents by agent” report if searching isn’t working.

action_text: Scroll down the Global reports list
rationale: If the desired report is further down, scrolling the Global reports list can reveal it for manual selection.
